content: SimHash (Charikar 2002, Manku/Google 2007): hash weighted token/shingle features into a 64-bit fingerprint; near-duplicates have small Hamming distance. Standard threshold k=3 bits out of 64 (~0.75 precision/recall on web-scale). O(tokens) per doc, fingerprint comparison is a single XOR+popcount (nanoseconds). Best for within-pubkey copy-paste detection. MinHash approximates Jaccard over n-gram sets; heavier (multiple hashes per doc) but more accurate on set overlap. SimHash is the cheaper/faster pick for per-pubkey self-similarity.
